title: arctotis bolusii
intro: Arctotis bolusii, also known as the 'Strandvarkbietjie' or 'African Daisy', is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In traditional medicine, Arctotis bolusii is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used to make a topical cream or salve, allowing for its medicinal properties to be applied directly to the skin.
